subtypes.name: Product
subtypes.description: A sellable product, product family, or product line.

subtypes.name: ProductArchitecture
subtypes.description: A hardware or platform architecture such as Blackwell.

subtypes.name: Technology
subtypes.description: A named technology, software stack, or technical capability.

subtypes.name: Metric
subtypes.description: A business, financial, operational, or telemetry measure.

subtypes.name: DocumentArtifact
subtypes.description: A report, filing, press release document, or other information artifact.

subtypes.name: Customer
subtypes.description: An organization buying products or consuming services.

subtypes.name: Partner
subtypes.description: An organization acting as a channel, supplier, or ecosystem partner.

subtypes.name: BusinessUnit
subtypes.description: An internal business group, segment, or operating unit.

subtypes.name: Vendor
subtypes.description: An external provider of products or services.

subtypes.name: Region
subtypes.description: A sales, support, or reporting region such as EMEA.

subtypes.name: FiscalPeriod
subtypes.description: A fiscal year, quarter, or reporting period.

subtypes.name: PressRelease
subtypes.description: A public announcement or earnings-related publication event.

subtypes.name: SupportIncident
subtypes.description: A support case, incident, or ticket.

subtypes.name: SalesTransaction
subtypes.description: A sale, order, booking, or revenue-generating transaction.
